scripts.clean:next: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item .next -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path .next-dev) { Remove-Item .next-dev -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path .next-build) { Remove-Item .next-build -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path tsconfig.tsbuildinfo) { Remove-Item tsconfig.tsbuildinfo -Force }"
scripts.dev:stable: set WATCHPACK_POLLING=true&& set CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true&& next dev
